secrets.description: The application's receiving wallet address on the Usernode blockchain network. All vote submission transactions are sent to this address.
IPFS pinning service API endpoint (e.g. https://api.pinata.cloud). Used to store photo evidence for vote submissions.
Pinata JWT bearer token for IPFS pinning. Required to upload photo evidence files. Encrypted at rest; staging uses a dummy value that returns a placeholder CID.
Set to true to enable local dev mode — skips all real blockchain and IPFS calls, returns fake data
Base URL of the Usernode node the indexer polls for on-chain transactions. Platform-managed in-network; optional for standalone deploys (the indexer no-ops when unset).
